nasb.text: All the men of Shechem and all Beth-millo assembled together, and they went and made Abimelech king, by the oak of the pillar which was in Shechem.

esv.text: And all the leaders of Shechem came together, and all Beth-millo, and they went and made Abimelech king, by the oak of the pillar at Shechem.

cnv.text: 示劍的眾人和伯特米羅人都聚集起來，到示劍橡樹旁的望樓那裡，立亞比米勒為王。

ccb.text: 示剑和米罗的人都聚集到示剑石柱旁的橡树下，拥立亚比米勒为王。
